creator: e@ik.nu
text:
New port of xtrojka, a game of skill.

How-To-Repeat: 
	

Fix: 
	
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	xtrojka
#	xtrojka/Makefile
#	xtrojka/pkg
#	xtrojka/pkg/COMMENT
#	xtrojka/pkg/DESCR
#	xtrojka/pkg/PLIST
#	xtrojka/files
#	xtrojka/files/md5
#	xtrojka/patches
#	xtrojka/patches/patch-aa
#
echo c - xtrojka
mkdir -p xtrojka > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xtrojka/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/Makefile << 'END-of-xtrojka/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   xtrojka
X# Version required:    1.1
X# Date created:        22 march 2000
X# Whom:                Edwin Mons
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	xtrojka
XPKGNAME=	xtrojka-1.1
XCATEGORIES=	games
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.funet.fi/pub/unix/games/
X
XMAINTAINER=	e@ik.nu
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}
X
XMAN6=		xtrojka.6
XMANCOMPRESSED=	yes
XUSE_XLIB=	yes
XUSE_X_PREFIX=	yes
X
Xpre-install:
X	@exec mkdirhier ${PREFIX}/share/xtrojka
X
Xpost-install:
X	strip ${PREFIX}/bin/xtrojka
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xtrojka/Makefile
echo c - xtrojka/pkg
mkdir -p xtrojka/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xtrojka/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-xtrojka/pkg/COMMENT'
XA game of skill.
END-of-xtrojka/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - xtrojka/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-xtrojka/pkg/DESCR'
XTrojka is a game of skill.  The aim of the game is to control and place 
Xfalling blocks so that you get three patterns or colors in a row, 
Xhorizontally or diagonally. These patterns then disappear, the above 
Xblocks collapse and you get points.
X
X- Edwin Mons
Xe@ik.nu
END-of-xtrojka/pkg/DESCR
echo x - xtrojka/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xtrojka/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/xtrojka
Xshare/xtrojka/xtrojka.scores
X@dirrm share/xtrojka
END-of-xtrojka/pkg/PLIST
echo c - xtrojka/files
mkdir -p xtrojka/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xtrojka/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/files/md5 << 'END-of-xtrojka/files/md5'
XMD5 (xtrojka.tar.gz) = 05a5909483d97ff6431084cadff70a99
END-of-xtrojka/files/md5
echo c - xtrojka/patches
mkdir -p xtrojka/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xtrojka/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >xtrojka/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-xtrojka/patches/patch-aa'
X*** Makefile.orig	Sat Oct 21 22:38:22 1995
X--- Makefile	Wed Mar 22 13:09:21 2000
X***************
X*** 22,34 ****
X  #	Touch 'hiscore.c' and 'score_status_mgr.c' when you change
X  #	these variables!
X  #
X! HSFILE=/usr/local/games/lib/xtrojka.scores
X  #HSFILE=/tmp/xtrojka.scores
X  CFLAGS= -DSCOREFILE='"$(HSFILE)"' 
X  
X  # add library search path
X  #
X! CFLAGS+=-L/usr/X11/lib
X  
X  # on some systems you might add this line, because gcc starts wining
X  # about 'sizeof(Display)', since Display might be an empty struct;
X--- 22,34 ----
X  #	Touch 'hiscore.c' and 'score_status_mgr.c' when you change
X  #	these variables!
X  #
X! HSFILE=${PREFIX}/share/xtrojka/xtrojka.scores
X  #HSFILE=/tmp/xtrojka.scores
X  CFLAGS= -DSCOREFILE='"$(HSFILE)"' 
X  
X  # add library search path
X  #
X! CFLAGS+=-L${X11BASE}/lib
X  
X  # on some systems you might add this line, because gcc starts wining
X  # about 'sizeof(Display)', since Display might be an empty struct;
X***************
X*** 42,65 ****
X  
X  #	location of xtrojka game
X  #
X! TARGET_DIR=/usr/games
X  
X  
X  #	location of the manualpage
X  #
X! MANDIR=/usr/local/man/man6
X  
X  
X  #	please comment out for the system you use
X  #
X  #	sunos 4.1.3
X! XDIR=/usr/openwin/include
X! LIBS=-lm
X  
X  # solaris
X  #XDIR=/usr/openwin/include
X  #LIBS=-lnsl
X  
X  #
X  #
X  #	main
X--- 42,69 ----
X  
X  #	location of xtrojka game
X  #
X! TARGET_DIR=${PREFIX}/bin
X  
X  
X  #	location of the manualpage
X  #
X! MANDIR=${PREFIX}/man/man6
X  
X  
X  #	please comment out for the system you use
X  #
X  #	sunos 4.1.3
X! #XDIR=/usr/openwin/include
X! #LIBS=-lm
X  
X  # solaris
X  #XDIR=/usr/openwin/include
X  #LIBS=-lnsl
X  
X+ # FreeBSD
X+ XDIR=${X11BASE}/include
X+ LIBS=-lm
X+ 
X  #
X  #
X  #	main
X***************
X*** 101,111 ****
X  #
X  #
X  install:
X! 	@echo $(HSFILE)|sed -e 's/\//\\\//g'>/tmp/hsn; \
X! 	sed -e "s/__SCOREDIR__/`cat /tmp/hsn`/g" manpage > xtrojka.6; \
X! 	cp xtrojka.6 $(MANDIR); chmod go+r xtrojka.6; \
X! 	cp xtrojka $(TARGET_DIR);chmod go+rx xtrojka; \
X! 	touch $(HSFILE); chmod go+rwx $(HSFILE);
X  	
X  clean:
X  	rm -rf *.o core xtrojka xtrojka.6 
X--- 105,119 ----
X  #
X  #
X  install:
X! 	echo $(HSFILE)|sed -e 's/\//\\\//g'>/tmp/hsn
X! 	sed -e "s/__SCOREDIR__/`cat /tmp/hsn`/g" manpage > xtrojka.6
X! 	gzip -c xtrojka.6 >$(MANDIR)/xtrojka.6.gz
X! 	cp xtrojka $(TARGET_DIR)
X! 	chmod 2755 $(TARGET_DIR)/xtrojka
X! 	chgrp games $(TARGET_DIR)/xtrojka
X! 	touch $(HSFILE)
X! 	chmod 664 $(HSFILE)
X! 	chgrp games $(HSFILE)
X  	
X  clean:
X  	rm -rf *.o core xtrojka xtrojka.6 
END-of-xtrojka/patches/patch-aa
exit
